response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling, but lacks explicit experience in executive leadership, fintech infrastructure, or regulated AI systems at scale. His background is more aligned with hands-on development and open-source contributions than CTO-level strategic oversight of AI-native fintech products.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq).
Diverse technical stack exposure, including real-time systems, microservices, and observability tools.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams to 30+ people.
Limited demonstrated experience with fintech-specific challenges (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance).
Agentic AI experience appears to be at the tooling/prototyping level rather than production-scale, regulated environments.
